form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 390m at Shepparton in a handy (22.27), beating Scott Charisma. Unbeaten in two starts from this draw. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 7 length sixth over 410m at this track. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 3 lengths over 425m at Bendigo (23.65). Can make it two on the bounce.
